has_mention.description: Indicates whether the concept was mentioned in the text (false by default).
has_mention.title: Has Mention

spans.description: The verbatim text where this concept was mentioned.

abdominal_pain.description: PUCAI-compatible abdominal pain variable. Allowed values: NONE: no abdominal pain; CAN_BE_IGNORED: pain can be ignored; CANNOT_BE_IGNORED: pain cannot be ignored; NOT_ASSESSED: abdominal pain assessment was not performed.

recall_window.description: Time window the documented 'abdominal_pain' refers to. Leave null when the window is not specified.

PUCAIActivityLevelMention.description:
PUCAI-compatible activity level variable. Captures functional limitation
in age-appropriate activities attributable to UC symptoms.

has_mention.description: Indicates whether the concept was mentioned in the text (false by default).
has_mention.title: Has Mention

spans.description: The verbatim text where this concept was mentioned.
spans.title: Spans

activity_level.description: PUCAI-compatible activity level variable. Allowed values: NO_LIMITATION: no limitation of activity; OCCASIONAL_LIMITATION: occasional limitation of activity; SEVERE_RESTRICTION: severe restriction of activity; NOT_ASSESSED: activity level was not assessed.

recall_window.description: Time window the documented 'activity_level' refers to. Leave null when the window is not specified.

PUCAIActivityLevelMention.title: PUCAIActivityLevelMention

PUCAINocturnalStoolsMention.description:
PUCAI-compatible nocturnal stools variable. PUCAI counts nocturnal
stooling only when it causes the patient to wake from sleep — passing
a stool on a planned nighttime bathroom trip does not qualify.

has_mention.description: Indicates whether the concept was mentioned in the text (false by default).
has_mention.title: Has Mention

spans.description: The verbatim text where this concept was mentioned.
spans.title: Spans

nocturnal_stools.description: PUCAI-compatible nocturnal stools variable. Allowed values: NONE: no nocturnal stools causing wakening; ANY_EPISODE_CAUSING_WAKENING: any episode of stooling that caused the patient to wake from sleep; NOT_ASSESSED: nocturnal stooling was not assessed.

recall_window.description: Time window the documented 'nocturnal_stools' refers to. Leave null when the window is not specified.

PUCAINocturnalStoolsMention.title: PUCAINocturnalStoolsMention

has_mention.description: Indicates whether the concept was mentioned in the text (false by default).
has_mention.title: Has Mention

spans.description: The verbatim text where this concept was mentioned.
spans.title: Spans

rectal_bleeding.description: PUCAI-compatible rectal bleeding variable. Allowed values: NONE: no rectal bleeding; SMALL_AMOUNT_LESS_THAN_HALF: small amount of blood in less than 50% of stools; SMALL_AMOUNT_MOST_STOOLS: small amount of blood with most stools; LARGE_AMOUNT: large amount of blood (more than 50% of stool content); NOT_ASSESSED: rectal bleeding was not assessed.

recall_window.description: Time window the documented 'rectal_bleeding' refers to. Leave null when the window is not specified.

PUCAIStoolConsistencyMention.description:
PUCAI-compatible stool consistency variable. Captures the consistency of
MOST stools over the recall window, not the worst stool of the day.

has_mention.description: Indicates whether the concept was mentioned in the text (false by default).
has_mention.title: Has Mention

spans.description: The verbatim text where this concept was mentioned.
spans.title: Spans

stool_consistency.description: PUCAI-compatible stool consistency variable, describing the consistency of MOST stools over the recall window. Allowed values: FORMED: most stools are formed; PARTIALLY_FORMED: most stools are partially formed; COMPLETELY_UNFORMED: most stools are completely unformed (liquid); NOT_ASSESSED: stool consistency was not assessed.

recall_window.description: Time window the documented 'stool_consistency' refers to. Leave null when the window is not specified.

PUCAIStoolConsistencyMention.title: PUCAIStoolConsistencyMention

PUCAIStoolsPerDayMention.description: PUCAI-compatible number of stools per 24 hours variable.

has_mention.description: Indicates whether the concept was mentioned in the text (false by default).
has_mention.title: Has Mention

spans.description: The verbatim text where this concept was mentioned.
spans.title: Spans

stools_per_day.description: PUCAI-compatible number of stools per 24 hours variable. Allowed values: NUM_STOOLS_0_TO_2: 0-2 stools per 24 hours; NUM_STOOLS_3_TO_5: 3-5 stools per 24 hours; NUM_STOOLS_6_TO_8: 6-8 stools per 24 hours; NUM_STOOLS_9_OR_MORE: more than 8 stools per 24 hours; NOT_ASSESSED: stool count per 24 hours was not assessed.

recall_window.description: Time window the documented 'stools_per_day' refers to. Leave null when the window is not specified.

PUCAIStoolsPerDayMention.title: PUCAIStoolsPerDayMention

PUCAITotalScoreMention.description:
Pediatric Ulcerative Colitis Activity Index (PUCAI)
Total score documented by the clinician at the point of care.
Range 0-85, in increments of 5 or 10.

Severity bands (Turner 2007):
  <10  remission
  10-34 mild
  35-64 moderate
  >=65  severe

spans.title: Spans

recall_window.description: Time window the documented 'total_score' refers to. Leave null when the window is not specified.

PUCAITotalScoreMention.title: PUCAITotalScoreMention

description:
PUCAI-compatible Annotation to extract PUCAI total_score and variables.

total_score: Explicitly stated PUCAI total score reported in the note.
Subscores are calculated from the following variables:

1. abdominal_pain: Severity of abdominal pain (none / can be ignored / cannot be ignored).
2. rectal_bleeding: Amount of rectal bleeding (none / small / large).
3. stool_consistency: Consistency of most stools (formed / partially formed / completely unformed).
4. stools_per_day: Number of stools per 24-hour period relative to age-based norms.
5. nocturnal_stools: Presence of any stool awakening the patient from sleep.
6. activity_level: Subjective patient or parent-reported functional activity level.
title: IbdPUCAIAnnotation
